Compare Median vs Average
Select a quarter and flat type to compare median and average prices side by side. The difference between the two reveals whether the market is skewed toward higher or lower priced transactions.
⚡ Instant · No external AI · Computed internally
What Actually Drives HDB Prices
Most headlines show overall prices. But that's not what you're buying.
You're buying a specific flat type, age, and location. The prices can differ a lot.
If you go in with the wrong benchmark, you'll be surprised.
This breakdown shows you the exact segment you're buying into, so you're not comparing against the wrong benchmark.
Because let's be real, not all flats are the same.
⚡ Computed internally from loaded data · No external sources
